title: Tenant boundary precheck

commands.summary: Final S03 closeout gate rerun after evidence creation

notes: No real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, credential, or secret data was used.

All commands are local validation, parser, test, Claude read-only review, or git whitespace checks; none execute service logic, create runtime routes, invoke Claude runtime review, write review queues, write review assignments, send review notifications, replace human approval, append audit ledgers, write audit events, write databases, write storage, or persist product state.
Pre-closeout npm run rp00:control-plane:validate failed only because S03 evidence files were intentionally not created yet; this command is rerun after evidence creation as the final gate.

Claude C00 valid review completed once using claude-opus-4-8 effort=max read-only packet review. Claude rated the S03 implementation GO with no P0/P1/P2 findings. Three P3 notes are informational and explicitly deferred: extra hand-authored blocked refs in validator, Matter shape consistency deferred to S04, and redundant guard checks.

evidence_summary.claude_review_dependency: C00 actual claude-opus-4-8 max read-only review completed once before production_ready closeout.
evidence_summary.human_approval_boundary: Human approval is not replaced or synthesized by this deterministic synthetic tenant-boundary precheck because no sensitive production mutation, client-facing output, external sharing, finance action, real data operation, runtime execution, audit write, storage write, database write, or product-state write occurs.
evidence_summary.tenant_boundary_precheck: S03 prechecks the S02 normalized Claude review request as metadata only, emits canonical allow or deny blocked-claim refs for tenant-boundary state, preserves model and read-only review semantics, keeps RP00.P02.M04 open, and hands off to RP00.P02.M04.S04.
